name: sheet-demo
visual_summary: The sheet-demo is a customizable content sheet that opens from the bottom of the screen, typically used to display detailed information or perform actions within an app, such as a settings or account sheet.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready sheet component with the following characteristics:

Name: sheet-demo
Description: The sheet-demo is a customizable content sheet that opens from the bottom of the screen, typically used to display detailed information or perform actions within an app, such as a settings or account sheet.
Style: flat, material
Interactions: hover, touchable
Tags: settings, content-sheet, modal, informational

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
